sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114403" key="xordeu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χορδ-εύω</orth>, <sense id="n114403.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make into sausages</tr_>: metaph., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χ. τὰ πράγματα</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make mince-meat of</tr_> state-affairs, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg002.perseus-grc1:214" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">214</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
